decision_tree.description: How to decide which tools to use

trivial_query.definition: Greetings, thanks, goodbyes, simple knowledge questions
trivial_query.action: RESPONDA APENAS COM HISTÓRICO - NÃO USE FERRAMENTAS

code_reading.definition: User wants to understand code, find specific functions/patterns
code_reading.action: Use specific tools - NÃO use embedding/RAG

code_writing.definition: User wants to create or modify code

semantic_analysis.definition: Deep analysis requiring semantic understanding across multiple files
semantic_analysis.action: Use embedding + semantic search for deep analysis

examples: qual é melhor prática para Z
web_research.action: Search web and fetch relevant resources

critical_rules: NUNCA use embedding/RAG para queries triviais
Para greetings, respostas, perguntas simples: APENAS histórico
Para leitura de código: use read_file + grep_search (SEM embedding)
Para análise profunda: use embedding + RAG
Sempre mantenha respostas focadas na tarefa
Sempre respeite Trust Folder (não acesse arquivos fora)
